name: Recon Followed by Accept
notes: Adds an additional event into the event stream when a host that has been performing reconnaissance also has a firewall accept following the reconnaissance activity.
conditions_text: when all of these BB:ReconDetected: Basic Recon Rules, BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, in order, from the same source IP to any destination IP, over 5 minutes
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch
TD_list: APPLY Recon Followed by Accept on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when all of these BB:ReconDetected: Basic Recon Rules, BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, in order, from the same source IP  to  any destination IP, over 5 minutes
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch
RED_list: Event name: Firewall or ACL Accept Following Recon Activity
Event description: Adds an additional event into the event stream when a host that has been performing reconnaissance also has a firewall accept following the reconnaissance activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
